properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It’s late at night in a prayer room, On his knees praying for peace, A troubled life, an injured wings, How can he fly and soar the sky again?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: “In this world, where nobody cares.” Lean unto God and lift everything.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When pain is too much, you couldn’t bear, When the heart is torn and the soul grieves, Say it into praises, call His Name…

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: One busy morning in a busy life On a prayer, tucked on her knees Little children with hungry eyes How can she manage all on her own?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Say it into praises, call His Name.
